characters.name: Arthur
characters.description: A brave knight from the northern kingdom

dialogues.text: Hello, traveler! Welcome to our village.
The dragon has been terrorizing our lands for months.
Will you help us defeat the beast?

characters.name: Elena
characters.description: A wise sorceress with mysterious powers

dialogues.text: I sense great power within you.
But beware, the path ahead is dangerous.

items.name: Magic Sword
items.description: A legendary blade infused with ancient magic

quests.title: The Dragon's Lair
quests.description: Defeat the ancient dragon and save the kingdom
